name: SyncGD
description: Advanced sync mod. Saves locally and to the cloud at a configurable interval. Handles offline mode with instant sync on reconnection.

save-interval.name: Auto-Save Interval
save-interval.description: How many minutes to wait between each automatic save.

enable-saveretry.name: Enable SaveRetry
enable-saveretry.description: Enable or disable the integrated SaveRetry logic.
